These studies often use standardized criteria including X-ray imaging techniques to assess mineralization levels accurately. Furthermore, these results hold true regardless of slight variances due to genetic predispositions or other individual differences among children. Therefore, option B correctly identifies the typical age range when root calcification in deciduous teeth is predominantly complete.
